injuries.comment: The Lightning said that Kucherov is a game time decision for Saturday's (Dec. 20) game versus the Hurricanes.
Martinook did not play on Friday's (Dec. 19) game versus the Panthers.
The Hurricanes said that Jarvis sustained an apparent upper-body injury in Friday's (Dec. 19) game versus the Panthers and is expected to miss time, per Chip Alexander of The Raleigh News & Observer.
